ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Jul-30-2024 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Jun-18-2024 Continued To Jul-30-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Richard Keene appeared by zoom for Jeffrey Barton (administrator).

Mr. Keene stated that he has the accounting done, but his client discovered that the decedent has oil and gas interests in Texas, that they got an Attorney in Texas, that the hearing date in Texas is July 10th and that the Texas proceeding should be in a position for final distribution very shortly. Mr. Keene also stated that he plans to amend the inventory and appraisal. Status on close of estate is continued to July 30, 2024, at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Mr. Keene is to file a petition for approval of a status report on status of administration by July 23, 2024.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Not reported.
